blockingIssues.description: SampleApp verification matches claims only at the '/Diagnostics/{rule}/' folder level plus aggregate counts, so diagnostics can move from intentionally broken examples onto safe examples in the same folder without failing the verifier.
The sample diagnostics verifier does not model or validate diagnostic severity, so rule severity drift can pass unnoticed despite the contract requiring rule ID, severity, and stable anchor matching.

The freshness check compares only configured sample mappings against SampleApp diagnostic directories and does not verify parity against the public diagnostic inventory, so future outward-facing diagnostics can drift without tripping the gate.

appliedUpdates.description: Added a repo-declared `site` command for generated docs-site validation to mirror the CI docs-surface workflow locally.
